task.title: Write Tests for a Plugin
task.shortdesc: Test pattern matching, action emission, and handler behavior before you deploy plugin logic to production migration jobs.

prereq.p: Set up a plugin test package with fixture content and pytest.
For first-time plugin onboarding, keep fixture packages small and isolate one edge case per test.

step.cmd: Write unit tests for pattern IDs, roles, and confidence values.
Write unit tests for emit_actions(...) with positive and negative evidence cases.
Write handler tests for success, failure, and dry-run outcomes.
Add an integration test that runs a fixture package through discovery, planning, and execution.
Run plugin structure validation and test suite in CI.

image.alt: Pattern, action, and handler tests flow into integration testing, plugin validation, and staged rollout.

result.p: You reduce rollout risk by validating each extension layer independently and then validating the full plugin slice end to end.
result.codeblock: plugin validate: pass pytest: all plugin unit and integration tests pass fixture execution report matches expected statuses
